title: Blooming Armor
description: A whimsical resource pack to wear some floral armor!
body:
Step into a softer side of survival with **Blooming Armor**, a beautifully crafted resource pack that transforms your armor and items into pieces inspired by nature itself!

**Features**:
- Armor retextured with delicate floral details. 
- Leather armor comes in various dyed colors, allowing you to mix and match your favorite shades.
- Subtle item retextures help identify your floral apparel.
